heading: Return Value
body:
The `collection.insertOne()` method returns a [Promise](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/JavaScript/Reference/Global_Objects/Promise) that
resolves to a document that describes the insert operation.

```typescript
Promise<object>
```

| Value             | Type   | Description                                                                       |
| ----------------- | ------ | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| result.insertedId | string | The \_id value of the document that the insert operation added to the collection. |
